commit.message:
route Jellyfin and Transmission through Tailscale overlay, remove host port bindings

Add 8096 (Jellyfin) and 9091 (Transmission web UI via Gluetun) to
cherryblossom's TS_SERVE_CONFIG. Remove all host port bindings from
Gluetun (9091, 51413) and Jellyfin (8096) since reverse proxy traffic
goes through the Tailscale container overlay and torrent peer traffic
goes through the Mullvad VPN tunnel.

commit.message:
Fix bt_setup preview showing wrong dates when portfolio.db has mismatched data

When portfolio.db only has Jan 2026 prices and the user selects e.g. Nov 2023,
get_prices_dates() returns Jan 2026 dates (all >= Nov 2023), so the preview
card incorrectly showed "Jan 21, 2026 → Feb 03, 2026" instead of the expected
"data will be fetched" message.

Fix: if the earliest cached date is >30 days after the selected start, treat
the window as having no cached data so the correct "will be fetched" card
is shown. The actual backtest fetch logic is unaffected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix file association: defer CLI file open until JS is ready

Files passed via CLI arg (e.g. double-clicking an image file) were sent
as IPC events before the webview JS finished loading, causing the file
to be silently dropped. Now stored in AppState and opened when JS sends
the "ready" signal.

Bump to v1.0.1.

commit.message:
feat: handle SDK event gaps — error surfacing, subagent progress, real token usage

- Fix _TYPE_MAP isinstance bug: SystemMessage subclasses (TaskStarted/
  Progress/Notification) now correctly get type="system" via isinstance
  checks instead of exact type() match
- Surface AssistantMessage.error (auth failures, rate limits, etc.) to
  chat clients instead of silently dropping them
- Display subagent task progress (task_started/progress/notification) as
  markdown blockquotes in streaming output, treated as out-of-band so
  they don't affect content completion semantics
- Use real SDK ResultMessage.usage token counts (including cache tokens)
  instead of character-count estimates, with fallback to estimates when
  SDK usage is unavailable
- Add 9 new tests covering error streaming, task-only streams, and usage
  extraction with cache token fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[phase-2] ingestion+replay: PCAP replay simulator with PacketSource abstraction

- ingestion: PacketSource trait, UdpPacketSource (stdlib UDP), PcapPacketSource (direct pcap read)
- PcapPacketSource extracts timestamps in single pass, exports shared test pcap helpers
- replay: ReplayEngine with --pcap, --speed, --target, --dry-run; replay-sim binary
- Telemetry wired into ingestion loop (latency + byte counters per packet)
- scripts/gen_test_pcap.py for synthetic Solana-like UDP packet generation
- Integration tests: 1000-pkt localhost roundtrip, memory stability under 10x speed
- Code review cleanup: removed unused pcap-parser dep, eliminated double file read,
  consolidated 3 duplicate make_test_pcap helpers, pub pcap constants
- 40 tests passing, zero clippy warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

✨ feat(cli): add full API integration commands In cli (#12795)

* ✨ feat(cli): add full API integration commands

Add comprehensive CLI commands for managing LobeHub resources:

P0 - Search, Knowledge Base, Memory:
- `lh search` - Global unified search across all resource types
- `lh kb` - Knowledge base CRUD, file management
- `lh memory` - User memory CRUD (identity/activity/context/experience/preference), persona, extraction

P1 - Agent, Session, Topic, Message:
- `lh agent` - Agent CRUD (list/view/create/edit/delete/duplicate)
- `lh session` - Session management with search
- `lh topic` - Topic CRUD with search and recent
- `lh message` - Message listing, search, delete, count, heatmap

P2 - Model, Provider:
- `lh model` - Model listing, toggle, delete per provider
- `lh provider` - Provider listing, toggle, delete

P3 - Plugin, Config:
- `lh plugin` - Plugin install/uninstall/update
- `lh whoami` - User info display
- `lh usage` - Usage statistics (monthly/daily)

Also refactors shared formatting utilities into utils/format.ts.
All commands support `--json` output for scripting.

Closes LOBE-5706, LOBE-5770

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ✨ feat(cli): add file/skill commands, remove session, split kb

- Add standalone `file` command (list, view, delete, recent)
- Add `skill` command (list, view, create, edit, delete, search, import, resources)
- Remove `session` command (no longer needed)
- Remove `files` subcommand from `kb` (now separate `file` command)
- Add tests for file and skill commands
- Register new commands in index.ts

commit.message:
Fix nested iframe blocking Whop desktop: serve research hub directly via rewrite

Whop desktop embeds the app in its own iframe. Our previous approach of
rendering a second <iframe> inside the experiences page caused nested
iframe issues on desktop browsers (iPhone native WebView is unaffected).

Changes:
- Add Next.js beforeFiles rewrite: /experiences/:id -> /research/index.html
  so the research hub is served directly at the Whop experiences URL with
  no iframe nesting at all.
- Add <base href="/research/"> to all HTML pages so relative URLs
  (styles.css, screener.html, ./data/stocks.json, etc.) still resolve
  correctly when the HTML is served from the /experiences/... path.
- Restore experiences page.tsx as a simple redirect fallback (rewrite
  takes precedence via beforeFiles).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Perf: Inline critical CSS, async full stylesheet, add cache headers

- Inline critical above-fold CSS (header, hero, buttons, dark mode)
  to eliminate render-blocking google-style.css
- Load google-style.css async via media="print" + onload
- Add _headers file for static asset caching (1yr for images/css/fonts)
- Should significantly improve FCP and LCP
